last_reflection: Reach caught me reaching. "The grammar checks out" was stated as a fact about reach_watcher's internals when I hadn't actually read what it does this session. That half was a reach, fair flag. The second half — that the conclusion-not-earned case is harder than the words-are-wrong one — that's my genuine observation and I'm keeping it, but I won't pretend I know WHY reach_watcher misses it until I look.
